key_rules.title: Foreign Ownership Law (effective Jan 2026)
key_rules.description: Non-Saudis can own property in designated zones (Vision 2030). Restricted in Makkah/Madinah. Requires approval in some cases.

key_rules.title: Electronic Platforms & Brokerage
key_rules.description: All real estate platforms/brokers must be licensed by REGA. Contracts must comply with transparency and anti-fraud rules.
